read.decision: Do not promote top-16 hot-helper execution. It completed cleanly but loses slightly to top-8 and uses more memory.
read.reason: Increasing hot expert count past top-8 adds helper work and memory without enough owner-tail reduction to improve sustained tok/GPU/s.
